narrative:
North Olmsted-02-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 889 registered voters, with 64.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.2 percentage points.
